title: MMM Convergence Output
description: The strict JSON data structure that mmm must output when judging both READ (context assembly) and WRITE (memory retention) operations.

operation_type.description: Indicates whether mmm is judging a memory candidate (write) or assembling context for a task (read).

metadata.description: Required when layer is 'skill'. Used for L2 aging and governance.

downgrade_condition.description: Under what condition should this skill be archived or downgraded?

read_decision.description: Required if operation_type is 'read'. Specifies what context must be loaded for the current task.

task_intent.description: What the user is trying to do.

skills_to_load.description: Which skills should be dynamically loaded.

memories_to_recall.description: Specific memory domains, run snapshots, or rules to retrieve.

rationale.description: Why these specific contexts are needed.
